title: eleocharis columbiensis
intro: Eleocharis columbiensis is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleocharis columbiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions made from its roots, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
